REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER BASED ON MISJOINDER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO (1) JOIN THE PRIOR OWNER; OR (2) ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT HYDE IS LIABLE FOR PRIOR OWNER'S WRONGDOINGS ON EACH CAUSE OF ACTION; OR (3) LIMIT THE ALLEGATIONS/DAMAGES TO HYDE'S OWNERSHIP. DEMURRER BASED ON THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS OVERRULED. APPLYING THE THEORIES OF CONTINUOUS ACCRUAL AND EQUITABLE TOLLING, PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS HAVE BEEN BROUGHT WITHIN THE APPLICABLE STATUES OF LIMITATIONS, I.E. LAST ACCRUAL DATE IS NOVEMBER 2012 AND CLAIMS HAVE BEEN BROUGHT ON MAY 24, 2013. AS TO THE DEMURRER BASED ON THE PENDING ACTION, PLAINTIFFS MAY, IF PROPER, JOIN MERIDIAN AS A DEFENDANT IN THIS ACTION IN PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OTHERWISE THIS ACTION SHALL BE ABATED UNTIL ZHIGADLO V. MERIDIAN IS RESOLVED. PLAINTIFFS SHALL FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. MOVING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. CLERK: NANCY BAUTISTA. NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer based on misjoinder is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) join the prior owner; or (2) allege facts showing that Hyde is liable for prior owner's wrongdoings on each cause of action; or (3) limit the allegations/damages to Hyde's ownership. Demurrer based on the statute of limitations is overruled. Applying the theories of continuous accrual and equitable tolling, Plaintiffs' claims have been brought within the applicable statues of limitations, i.e. last accrual date is November 2012 and claims have been brought on May 24, 2013. As to the demurrer based on the pending action, Plaintiffs may, if proper, join Meridian as a defendant in this action in Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint. Otherwise this action shall be abated until Zhigadlo v. Meridian is resolved. Plaintiffs shall file amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Moving party prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Jun-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Conor Granahan, Esq., (415-830-3325) for Aurora King, Plaintiff and opposing party.
No other Appearances.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 19, 2014 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff to serve notice to other party. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances:

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Defendant and its counsel failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C and Court's order requiring compliance. See September 17, 2013 minute order CGC-13-528383. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
